title: Claude Voice Mode Gains Opus and Sonnet Model Support
excerpt: Anthropic has updated Claude's voice mode to support its more powerful Opus and Sonnet models, expanding a feature that was previously limited to...
content_html:
Anthropic has updated Claude's voice mode to support its more powerful Opus and Sonnet models, expanding a feature that was previously limited to the company's fastest-but-simplest model, Haiku.


Voice mode lets users hold full spoken conversations with the chatbot rather than having to type prompts and read responses. Users can switch between Claude's models mid-conversation, and can also move between text and voice in the same chat without losing context. With the addition of Opus and Sonnet support, users will be able to hold longer and more complex conversations, including providing feedback on the communication style.

In addition, Claude's Voice mode can now also tap into connected tools like Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Docs, and Slack, so Claude can check a calendar or summarize an email thread out loud, for example. Users with free accounts can connect one tool, whereas paid plans support more.

According to Anthropic's support documentation, the models available in voice mode now follow the user's subscription plan, and voice conversations start on whichever model the user last selected in text chat.

Claude's voice mode language support was extended beyond English earlier this year, with French, German, Hindi, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese, and Spanish available in beta. Users have to manually select a language in the app.


Voice mode works on iOS, Android, desktop, and the web, but Anthropic says it is designed to work best on phones. Voice conversations count toward standard usage limits and Anthropic's newest Fable model is not yet supported.

Meanwhile, OpenAI yesterday launched ChatGPT Voice in its desktop app, powered by a model it calls GPT-Live, which the company says can direct multiple agents running in ChatGPT Work or Codex by voice alone. The feature is rolling out on macOS and Windows to paid plans.

Correction: This story has been updated to reflect ChatGPT Voice's recent rollout.

Wednesday July 1, 2026 4:35 pm PDT by Juli Clover

Anthropic's Fable 5 model is once again available for use, the company said today. Claude users are now seeing the option to use Fable 5, with Anthropic rolling out an in-app message. Through July 7, eligible Claude subscribers can use up to 50 percent of their plan's weekly usage limit on Fable 5. After hitting that limit, Fable 5 use will require credits. Claude Cowork Expands to iPhone and the Web

Tuesday July 7, 2026 1:05 pm PDT by Juli Clover

Anthropic today said it is bringing Claude Cowork to mobile and the web, with beta access rolling out to Max users first. Claude Cowork is a feature that lets Claude access local files and connected tools, then autonomously complete tasks on your behalf. Claude Cowork tasks can now be started and monitored on the web, desktop, and Claude mobile apps. Claude is able to work in the background...

content_html_zh:
Anthropic 更新了 Claude 的语音模式，以支持其更强大的 Opus 和 Sonnet 模型，扩展了之前仅限于该公司最快但最简单的模型 Haiku 的功能。

语音模式允许用户与聊天机器人进行完整的口头对话，而不必键入提示和阅读回复。 用户可以在对话中切换克劳德的模型，还可以在同一次聊天中在文本和语音之间切换，而不会丢失上下文。 增加 Opus 和 Sonnet 支持后，用户将能够进行更长时间、更复杂的对话，包括提供有关沟通风格的反馈。

此外，克劳德的语音模式现在还可以利用 Gmail、谷歌日历、谷歌文档和 Slack 等互联工具，因此克劳德可以检查日历或大声总结电子邮件线程。 拥有免费帐户的用户可以连接一种工具，而付费计划则支持更多工具。

根据 Anthropic 的支持文档，语音模式下可用的模型现在遵循用户的订阅计划，语音对话将从用户最后在文本聊天中选择的模型开始。

今年早些时候，Claude 的语音模式语言支持已扩展到英语之外，测试版中还提供法语、德语、印地语、印度尼西亚语、意大利语、日语、韩语、葡萄牙语和西班牙语。 用户必须在应用程序中手动选择语言。

语音模式适用于 iOS、Android、桌面和网络，但 Anthropic 表示，它的设计最适合在手机上使用。 语音对话计入标准使用限制，并且尚不支持 Anthropic 最新的 Fable 模型。

与此同时，OpenAI 昨天在其桌面应用程序中推出了 ChatGPT Voice，该应用程序由名为 GPT-Live 的模型提供支持，该公司表示，该模型可以仅通过语音来指导在 ChatGPT Work 或 Codex 中运行的多个代理。 该功能正在 macOS 和 Windows 上以付费套餐的形式推出。

更正：本文已更新，以反映 ChatGPT Voice 最近的推出。
